command: for f in packages/app/src/i18n/*.ts; do c=$(rg -c 'command\.session\.export' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); if [ "$c" = "0" ]; then echo "MISSING: $f"; else echo "OK: $f ($c matches)"; fi; done
